---
name: New Example
about: Share a context architecture you built for your industry or use case
title: "[Example] "
labels: example, community
assignees: ''
---

## What industry or use case?

e.g., SaaS product team, law firm, e-commerce, nonprofit, agency

## How many data points?

How many data points does your architecture include?

## What clusters did you use?

List the clusters you organized your data points into.

## What worked well?

What about the BCOS approach was most valuable for your use case?

## What was missing or awkward?

Anything that didn't fit well or that you had to work around?

## Would you like to contribute this as an example?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR with my (anonymized) example
- [ ] No, just sharing for discussion
- [ ] Maybe, I'd need help anonymizing it first
